Thanks for contributing to glyph8! Please fill in the sections below.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this change and why? Link related issues. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all -- --check` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings` passes
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace` passes
- [ ] If this affects rendering, input, or runloop: relevant section of
      [`docs/qa-checklist.md`](../docs/qa-checklist.md) walked through in
      a real terminal
- [ ] If this is a stage-level change: design spec in
      [`docs/superpowers/specs/`](../docs/superpowers/specs/) updated/added
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` entry added under `## [Unreleased]` (skip for
      docs-only / chore PRs)

## Notes for reviewer

<!-- Anything tricky, deliberately out-of-scope, or follow-up. -->
